scripts.db:test:push: docker exec roomlog-postgres psql -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-roomlog} -d ${POSTGRES_TEST_DB:-roomlog_test} -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c 'DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema prisma/schema.prisma --script | docker exec -i roomlog-postgres psql -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-roomlog} -d ${POSTGRES_TEST_DB:-roomlog_test} -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1
